_comment: Late-window GT checkpoints for the v8 acceptance test (crosshair-center scenario, click (968,529)). ANCHOR DEFINITION (2026-07-08 re-anchor audit): centroid of the structure's segmented dark component (local Otsu, largest component near the point) — objective and reproducible. Coordinates visually confirmed by the user on 2026-07-08 from rendered comparisons (output/checkpoints/late_gt_compare_read*.png); confirmation scope: coordinates only. The previous transported GT measured 11-47px off-object (read-390 point was 46.8px from the structure centroid — beyond the old tolerance itself) and was replaced; trajectory agreement improved from 8-38px to 2-11px. TOLERANCES (user-adopted rule, 2026-07-08): tol = clamp(1.25 x measured_target_diagonal, 15, 40) px per checkpoint; measured diagonals 32.5/31.2/30.8/35.8/40.8 px. Full-grid rerun PASSED 2026-07-08 under these coordinates + tolerances (V8_FULL_GRID=1: 5 tests OK across all 6 selections).
